stemHtml: An unidentified baggage arrives at a destination airport other than the airport it was supposed to arrive. What should the destination airport do?

options.a: The destination must retain/restrain the baggage until the passenger claims it.
options.b: The destination should allow the operator to send the baggage to the person’s location.
options.c: The destination may store the baggage until the next scheduled flight.
options.d: The destination may forward the baggage without any clearance.
